data.content: Refine the app, make so it has login page and users, you have DB setup. Users are as flows admin and user (he can be driver and/or rider he manages his state in settings but when first applying as driver make "KYC" form and ask for info, and user just needs to set his mail pass and address). Make forms for ride booking and ride making. And Admin can access all tables and forms but users can only access their rides and reservations. Make ride and reservation confirmation site
